column1: # This file defines genomic regions of interest for batch plotting.
#   name   - Region name/label (used in output filenames)
#   region - Genomic coordinates in UCSC format: chr:start-end
#   resolution - Hi-C bin resolution in bp (for bearing_hic_plot.py)
#   label      - Custom label for the region (overrides name in plot titles)
#   out        - Custom output filename (overrides default naming)
